name: NASA SRTMGL1 Version 3 Global 1 arc-second DEM
provider: NASA LP DAAC / USGS
license: NASA Earthdata open data; redistribution allowed with citation
formats: HGT, GeoTIFF via Earthdata/OpenTopography/GEE
access: Earthdata download, OpenTopography API, Google Earth Engine asset USGS/SRTMGL1_003
doi_or_citation: 10.5067/MEaSUREs/SRTM/SRTMGL1.003
time_span: SRTM mission February 2000; Version 3 release
notes: Canonical NASA/USGS 30 m land DEM backbone; GEE and OpenTopography provide common analysis/download routes.
desc_zh: SRTMGL1 v003 是 NASA/USGS 发布的全球 1 角秒数字高程模型，主要覆盖约北纬 60 度至南纬 56 度陆地区域。它是地形、水文、灾害、生态和遥感几何校正中最常用的开放 DEM 基线之一，可通过 NASA Earthdata、OpenTopography 和 Google Earth Engine 等渠道访问。
desc_en: SRTMGL1 v003 is the NASA/USGS 1 arc-second global digital elevation model derived from the Shuttle Radar Topography Mission. It covers most land areas between about 60N and 56S and is a core open DEM baseline for terrain analysis, hydrology, hazards, ecology, and remote-sensing preprocessing. Access routes include NASA Earthdata, OpenTopography, and the Google Earth Engine asset USGS/SRTMGL1_003.
openness: open with free Earthdata account for some routes
source_type: official DOI and cloud analysis mirror
evidence: NASA DOI landing page; GEE asset USGS/SRTMGL1_003; OpenTopography global SRTM access

name: NASA SRTMGL3 Version 3 Global 3 arc-second DEM
provider: NASA LP DAAC / USGS
license: NASA Earthdata open data; redistribution allowed with citation
formats: HGT, GeoTIFF via Earthdata/OpenTopography
access: Earthdata download and OpenTopography API
doi_or_citation: 10.5067/MEaSUREs/SRTM/SRTMGL3.003
time_span: SRTM mission February 2000; Version 3 release
notes: Coarser 90 m companion to SRTMGL1, useful for legacy workflows and lower-volume global processing.
desc_zh: SRTMGL3 v003 是 NASA/USGS 的 3 角秒全球 DEM，是 30 m SRTM 产品的较粗分辨率配套版本。它适合低数据量全球制图、旧模型复现和区域尺度地形分析，仍保留 SRTM 的稳定引用与官方下载链路。
desc_en: SRTMGL3 v003 is the 3 arc-second companion to the NASA/USGS SRTM global DEM family. The product is useful for lower-volume global processing, legacy model reproduction, and regional terrain applications where 90 m resolution is sufficient. It retains official DOI-backed access through NASA Earthdata and related distribution services.
openness: open with free Earthdata account for some routes
evidence: NASA DOI landing page and Earthdata distribution

name: NASADEM HGT v001
provider: NASA LP DAAC / JPL
license: NASA Earthdata open data; redistribution allowed with citation
formats: HGT, GeoTIFF via Earthdata/GEE
access: Earthdata download, Google Earth Engine asset NASA/NASADEM_HGT/001
doi_or_citation: 10.5067/MEaSUREs/NASADEM/NASADEM_HGT.001
time_span: SRTM-era elevation with improved auxiliary processing
notes: Reprocessed SRTM-based DEM with improved void filling and auxiliary data integration; important modern replacement for many SRTM workflows.
desc_zh: NASADEM HGT v001 是 NASA 对 SRTM 高程进行再处理后的全球 DEM，改进了空洞填补、控制数据和辅助资料融合。它常被作为 SRTMGL1 的现代替代或补充，可通过 Earthdata 和 Google Earth Engine 访问。
desc_en: NASADEM HGT v001 is NASA's reprocessed SRTM-based global elevation product, improving void filling, control, and auxiliary-data integration relative to older SRTM releases. It is commonly used as a modern replacement or complement to SRTMGL1 in terrain, hydrology, and remote-sensing workflows. Access is available through Earthdata and Google Earth Engine.
openness: open with free Earthdata account for some routes
evidence: NASA DOI landing page; GEE asset NASA/NASADEM_HGT/001

name: ASTER Global Digital Elevation Model Version 3
provider: NASA LP DAAC / METI / NASA
license: NASA Earthdata open data with citation
formats: GeoTIFF
access: Earthdata download and Google Earth Engine asset NASA/ASTER_GED/AG100_003
doi_or_citation: 10.5067/ASTER/ASTGTM.003
time_span: ASTER stereo scenes through Version 3 release
notes: Optical stereo DEM complementing radar DEMs, with broader high-latitude land coverage than SRTM but different artifact characteristics.
desc_zh: ASTER GDEM v3 是由 METI/NASA ASTER 立体像对生成的全球 1 角秒 DEM，覆盖约 83N 至 83S 陆地。它与 SRTM/NASADEM 具有不同误差来源和覆盖优势，常用于多源高程比较、高纬地区补充和地形制图。
desc_en: ASTER GDEM Version 3 is a global 1 arc-second DEM generated from METI/NASA ASTER stereo imagery, covering land areas from roughly 83N to 83S. It complements radar-derived DEMs such as SRTM and NASADEM with different error characteristics and broader high-latitude coverage. The product is distributed through NASA Earthdata and mirrored in cloud analysis environments.
openness: open with Earthdata access and citation
evidence: NASA DOI landing page; LP DAAC ASTER GDEM record; GEE ASTER elevation assets

name: Copernicus DEM GLO-30
provider: European Space Agency / Copernicus / Airbus Defence and Space
license: Copernicus free and open data policy / COP-DEM terms
formats: GeoTIFF, COG via cloud mirrors, GEE ImageCollection
access: Copernicus Data Space, AWS Open Data, Google Earth Engine asset COPERNICUS/DEM/GLO30
doi_or_citation: Copernicus DEM product documentation and data access citation
time_span: WorldDEM-derived edited DEM, public release from 2019 onward
notes: High-value 30 m global DEM derived from WorldDEM, widely used through GEE and cloud-optimized access routes; deduped against GLO-90 as separate resolution collection.
desc_zh: Copernicus DEM GLO-30 是 ESA/Copernicus 基于 WorldDEM 编辑发布的全球 30 m 数字高程模型。它在 Google Earth Engine、Copernicus Data Space 和开放云镜像中使用频率很高，是当前全球 DEM 分析的重要基准之一。
desc_en: Copernicus DEM GLO-30 is a 30 m global digital elevation model released through the Copernicus programme and derived from edited WorldDEM data. It is widely used in Google Earth Engine, Copernicus Data Space, and cloud-optimized workflows. The product is one of the strongest current global DEM baselines for terrain, hazards, hydrology, and environmental modelling.
openness: open under Copernicus DEM access terms
source_type: official cloud catalog and provider portal
evidence: GEE COPERNICUS/DEM/GLO30 page; Copernicus Data Space collection description; AWS registry

provider: European Space Agency / Copernicus / Airbus Defence and Space
license: Copernicus free and open data policy / COP-DEM terms
formats: GeoTIFF, COG via cloud mirrors, GEE ImageCollection
access: Copernicus Data Space, AWS Open Data, Google Earth Engine asset COPERNICUS/DEM/GLO90
doi_or_citation: Copernicus DEM product documentation and data access citation
time_span: WorldDEM-derived edited DEM, public release from 2019 onward
notes: 90 m companion to GLO-30, useful for smaller global workflows and legacy-resolution comparisons.
desc_zh: Copernicus DEM GLO-90 是 Copernicus 全球 DEM 的 90 m 版本，保留 WorldDEM 派生编辑成果但数据量更小。它适合全球尺度制图、模型预处理和与 SRTMGL3 等 90 m 产品比较。
desc_en: Copernicus DEM GLO-90 is the 90 m version of the Copernicus global DEM family, preserving the edited WorldDEM-derived elevation surface at a lighter data volume. It is useful for global mapping, model preprocessing, and comparisons with 90 m products such as SRTMGL3. Access is available through Copernicus, GEE, and cloud mirrors.
openness: open under Copernicus DEM access terms
source_type: official cloud catalog and provider portal
evidence: AWS Open Data Copernicus DEM registry; Copernicus Data Space collection description; Digital Earth Africa COP-DEM access notes

provider: JAXA EORC
license: JAXA AW3D30 terms of use; free registration download

access: JAXA download after free registration; GEE asset JAXA/ALOS/AW3D30/V3_2
doi_or_citation: JAXA ALOS World 3D - 30m product citation
time_span: ALOS PRISM stereo archive, multiple public versions
notes: Global DSM derived from ALOS PRISM; a key optical-stereo alternative to SRTM/ASTER/Copernicus DEM.
desc_zh: AW3D30 是 JAXA 基于 ALOS PRISM 立体观测发布的全球 30 m 数字表面模型。它提供与雷达 DEM 不同的观测几何和误差结构，常用于全球地形制图、山地分析和多 DEM 交叉验证。
desc_en: AW3D30 is JAXA's global 30 m digital surface model derived from ALOS PRISM stereo observations. It provides an optical-stereo alternative to radar DEMs, with different viewing geometry and error characteristics. The dataset is commonly used for global terrain mapping, mountain analysis, and cross-validation among DEM products.
openness: free download with registration and terms
source_type: official provider portal and GEE mirror
evidence: JAXA AW3D30 landing page; GEE JAXA/ALOS/AW3D30/V3_2 page

name: MERIT DEM
provider: University of Tokyo / Yamazaki Lab
license: Creative Commons BY-NC 4.0 for research/education use
formats: GeoTIFF
access: project download with user registration/terms
doi_or_citation: Yamazaki et al. 2017, Geophysical Research Letters, MERIT DEM
time_span: released 2017; based on multiple global DEM inputs
notes: Error-reduced DEM removing major absolute bias, stripe noise, speckle noise, and tree-height bias from existing global DEMs.
desc_zh: MERIT DEM 是东京大学团队发布的多误差消除全球 DEM，重点校正绝对偏差、条带噪声、斑点噪声和树高偏差等问题。它在水文建模、洪水模拟和全球地形分析中影响很大，但许可证更偏科研教育使用。
desc_en: MERIT DEM is a multi-error-removed global DEM produced by the University of Tokyo team. It corrects major biases and noise patterns in existing global DEMs, including absolute bias, stripe noise, speckle noise, and tree-height bias. The product is especially influential in hydrological modelling, flood analysis, and global terrain studies, with access governed by research-oriented terms.
openness: free for research/education under stated terms
evidence: MERIT DEM project page; Yamazaki et al. 2017 paper citation

name: FABDEM
provider: University of Bristol / University of Sheffield
theme_raw: Forest And Buildings removed Copernicus DEM
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International
formats: GeoTIFF
access: University of Bristol data repository download
doi_or_citation: FABDEM data repository record and Hawker et al. publication
time_span: derived from Copernicus DEM with ML removal of forests/buildings
notes: Global bare-earth elevation estimate created by removing forest and building biases from Copernicus DEM; central for flood and exposure modelling.
desc_zh: FABDEM 是在 Copernicus DEM 基础上去除森林和建筑物高程偏差的全球近似裸地 DEM。它以开放数据仓库形式发布，尤其适合洪水风险、暴露度、城市与低地地形建模等需要裸地高程的应用。
desc_en: FABDEM is a global approximate bare-earth DEM generated by removing forest and building biases from Copernicus DEM. It is released through an open university data repository and is particularly valuable for flood-risk modelling, exposure assessment, urban terrain analysis, and other applications that require terrain elevation rather than surface height.
evidence: University of Bristol data repository record

desc_zh: GMTED2010 是 USGS/NGA 发布的全球多分辨率地形高程数据，提供 30、15 和 7.5 角秒等尺度。它是 GTOPO30 的后继产品，适合全球粗尺度制图、气候/环境模型和低数据量分析。
desc_en: GMTED2010 is a USGS/NGA global multi-resolution terrain elevation dataset available at 30, 15, and 7.5 arc-second resolutions. It was developed as a successor to GTOPO30 and remains useful for coarse global mapping, climate and environmental modelling, and low-volume terrain workflows.
evidence: USGS GMTED2010 page

notes: Historical global 30 arc-second DEM still useful for reproducibility and legacy model comparisons.
desc_zh: GTOPO30 是 USGS EROS 的经典全球 30 角秒 DEM，虽然已被 GMTED2010 等产品替代，但在早期全球模型和历史研究复现中仍很重要。它作为美国公共领域数据可从 USGS 档案访问。
desc_en: GTOPO30 is the classic USGS EROS global 30 arc-second DEM. Although superseded by products such as GMTED2010, it remains important for reproducing older global models and historical studies. The archive is distributed as U.S. public-domain data through USGS.
evidence: USGS EROS GTOPO30 archive page

desc_zh: EarthEnv-DEM90 是 EarthEnv 发布的全球 90 m 融合 DEM，综合 CGIAR-SRTM、ASTER GDEM 等来源并处理空洞与质量问题。它常用于生态、物种分布、环境建模等需要一致全球地形层的研究。
desc_en: EarthEnv-DEM90 is a global 90 m fused DEM built from sources including CGIAR-SRTM and ASTER GDEM, with void filling and quality-selection decisions. It is often used in ecology, species-distribution modelling, and environmental studies that need a consistent global terrain layer.
source_type: official project page and dataset citation

desc_en: HydroSHEDS provides SRTM-derived hydrologically conditioned elevation and drainage products designed for flow direction, accumulation, and basin analysis. This row captures the raster elevation and hydrological terrain product line rather than ordinary vector hydrography. It is a key global open source for hydrology-ready DEM workflows.
openness: free under HydroSHEDS terms with citation
source_type: official product portal and paper-backed dataset
evidence: HydroSHEDS product page

desc_en: ETOPO 2022 is NOAA NCEI's global topobathymetric relief model covering both land topography and ocean bathymetry. It is not a purely terrestrial DEM, but it is essential for continuous global elevation, coastal work, Earth-system modelling, and visualization. The dataset is distributed as U.S. public-domain data.
evidence: NOAA NCEI ETOPO product page

notes: Topobathymetric grid included as DEM-adjacent global elevation source for ocean/land continuity; not counted as terrestrial DEM alone.
desc_zh: GEBCO 全球格网是海底地形与陆地高程连续表达的重要开放数据源，常用于全球起伏、水深、海岸带和地球可视化。它更偏全球地形-水深格网，适合作为 DEM 图谱中的邻接类核心数据而非纯陆地 DEM。
desc_en: The GEBCO global grid is a major open source for continuous bathymetric and topographic elevation. It is widely used for global relief, ocean depth, coastal analysis, and Earth visualization. In this DEM atlas it is treated as a topobathymetric adjacent core dataset rather than a purely terrestrial DEM.
openness: free download under GEBCO attribution terms
evidence: GEBCO gridded bathymetry data page

desc_en: ArcticDEM provides high-resolution Arctic DEM strips and mosaics generated from commercial satellite stereo imagery by the Polar Geospatial Center and partners. It is a core terrain dataset for cryosphere, glacier, permafrost, polar geomorphology, and mapping applications. Access routes include PGC downloads and cloud/STAC distribution.

desc_en: REMA is the Reference Elevation Model of Antarctica, providing high-resolution DEM strips and mosaics derived from stereo satellite imagery. It is an authoritative base layer for Antarctic ice-sheet, ice-shelf, glacier, polar mapping, and change-detection studies. Distribution is available through PGC and cloud/STAC channels.

It provides strip and mosaic elevation products suitable for high-resolution terrain analysis in mountains, hazards, and other non-polar settings, but it is not a complete global coverage dataset.

desc_en: USGS 3DEP is the official U.S. national elevation program, providing DEM products at resolutions such as 1 m, 1/3 arc-second, and 1 arc-second, along with services and downloads. desc_en: The Canadian Digital Elevation Model is Natural Resources Canada's national DEM product line for Canada. It serves as an open base layer for national and regional terrain analysis and mapping. CDEM complements the higher-resolution HRDEM collection by providing broader national elevation coverage.

desc_en: Canada's HRDEM is a high-resolution digital elevation model collection built from lidar and other high-quality source data where available. It provides finer terrain representation than national lower-resolution DEMs and supports flood, urban, engineering, forestry, and detailed geomorphology applications.

desc_en: EU-DEM v1.1 is a pan-European DEM from the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service, derived from sources including SRTM and ASTER GDEM with regional processing. It remains a common open elevation layer in European environmental monitoring, terrain analysis, and legacy workflows.

It is a high-value radar-interferometric DEM for global terrain, hydrology, hazards, and multi-DEM comparison studies. Access is free/open for appropriate uses but governed by DLR product terms and a registration or ordering workflow.
openness: free access under DLR scientific/product terms

desc_en: DeltaDTM is a terrain model focused on global river deltas, designed to improve elevation representation in low-lying, flood-sensitive environments. It is exposed through the Earth Engine Community Catalog and supported by a recent dataset paper. The product is relevant to delta risk, sea-level-rise, and flooding studies.

desc_en: Viewfinder Panoramas DEM3 is a long-running community-curated corrected DEM/HGT tile collection, often used for mountain regions, legacy map production, and filling gaps in SRTM/ASTER-era workflows. desc_en: BedMachine Antarctica is an NSIDC/NASA MEaSUREs product providing Antarctic bed topography, surface elevation, and ice thickness. Google Earth Engine exposes the dataset as AU/GA/AUSTRALIA_5M_DEM for cloud-based analysis.

desc_en: DEM-S Australian Smoothed Digital Elevation Model is a 1 arc-second, roughly 30 m, SRTM-derived smoothed DEM from Geoscience Australia. It applies adaptive smoothing to reduce noise and improve terrain-shape representation for slope, aspect, and curvature calculations, and is distinct from the hydrologically enforced DEM-H product already catalogued.

desc_en: CPOM CryoSat-2 Antarctica 1km DEM is a digital elevation model of the Antarctic ice sheet and ice shelves derived from CryoSat-2 radar-altimeter observations collected between July 2010 and July 2016. The GEE asset CPOM/CryoSat2/ANTARCTICA_DEM provides 1 km elevation, slope, smoothed elevation, uncertainty, and data-composition bands; its GEE terms are marked proprietary.

name: Digital Earth Australia Intertidal 2.1.0
provider: Geoscience Australia / Digital Earth Australia
theme_raw: DEA Intertidal ga_s2ls_intertidal_cyear_3; annual 10 m intertidal elevation and exposure product
coverage: Australia exposed intertidal zone, approximately 112E-154E and 44S-9S
license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)
formats: continental 10 m GeoTIFF layers; AWS cloud access; ELVIS download; NCI; WMS
access: DEA Knowledge Hub product page, Geoscience Australia DEA Intertidal page, AWS streaming, ELVIS download, NCI access, WMS, code examples
doi_or_citation: 10.26186/149403; Bishop-Taylor, R., Phillips, C., Newey, V., Sagar, S. (2024). Digital Earth Australia Intertidal. Geoscience Australia, Canberra.
time_span: 2016 to 2024 coverage in v2.1.0; annual updates ongoing; issued 2024 with April 2026 update noted on GA page
notes: Current DEA Intertidal product supersedes the older NIDEM concept. It provides annual continental-scale elevation, exposure, tidal-attribute, and quality layers for Australia's exposed intertidal zone using combined Sentinel-2 and Landsat DEA Collection 3 surface reflectance products. Files can be very large, so DEA recommends cloud streaming from AWS; ELVIS download, NCI, WMS, and examples are also advertised.
desc_zh: Digital Earth Australia Intertidal 2.1.0 是 Geoscience Australia/DEA 发布的澳大利亚潮间带年度高程与暴露产品，利用 Sentinel-2 与 Landsat 数据生成 10 m 分辨率 GeoTIFF 图层。产品覆盖 2016-2024 年并持续年度更新，提供 AWS 云端流式访问、ELVIS 下载、NCI、WMS 和代码示例，许可为 CC BY 4.0。
desc_en: Digital Earth Australia Intertidal 2.1.0 is Geoscience Australia’s annual 10 m elevation and exposure product for Australia’s exposed intertidal zone. It combines Sentinel-2 and Landsat DEA Collection 3 data into continental GeoTIFF layers covering 2016-2024, with ongoing annual updates. Access routes include AWS cloud streaming, ELVIS download, NCI, WMS, and code examples under CC BY 4.0.

notes: The official Defra Data Services page describes the LIDAR Composite DSM as a raster elevation model covering about 99% of England at 1 m spatial resolution. The DSM is produced from the last or only laser pulse returned to the sensor and includes surface objects such as vehicles, buildings, and vegetation as well as terrain. The 2022 composite merges Environment Agency Time Stamped archive and National LIDAR Programme surveys, using the newest and best-resolution data where repeats exist. Data are downloadable as GeoTIFF rasters in 5 km OS National Grid tiles, in metres relative to Ordnance Survey Newlyn using OSTN15, with individual-survey vertical accuracy about +/-15 cm RMSE. This row complements the existing bare-earth Environment Agency LIDAR Composite DTM 1m row.

desc_en: Environment Agency LIDAR Composite DSM 1m is a 1 m digital surface model covering approximately 99% of England. It is produced from Environment Agency Time Stamped archive and National LIDAR Programme surveys collected between 2000 and 2022, retaining surface objects such as buildings, vegetation, and vehicles as well as terrain. The product is distributed as GeoTIFF tiles through Defra/EA services and is also available in Google Earth Engine as part of the 2022 England 1 m DTM/DSM composite.

name: Environment Agency LIDAR Composite First Return DSM 1m
provider: Environment Agency England / Defra Data Services Platform
theme_canonical: National LiDAR first-return digital surface model
theme_raw: LIDAR Composite First Return Digital Surface Model (FZ_DSM) - 1m
coverage: England; approximately 99% coverage according to Environment Agency metadata, but not matching the last-return DSM coverage or extent exactly
license: Open Government Licence v3.0
formats: GeoTIFF rasters in 5 km OS National Grid tiles; WCS/WMTS/OGC API service references on the dataset page; Google Earth Engine image includes first-return DSM band
access: Defra/Environment Agency Data Services dataset and survey download portal; GEE asset UK/EA/ENGLAND_1M_TERRAIN/2022 includes first-return DSM band
doi_or_citation: Environment Agency dataset identifier df4e3ec3-315e-48aa-aaaf-b5ae74d7b2bb; GEE asset UK/EA/ENGLAND_1M_TERRAIN/2022
time_span: National LIDAR Programme source data from 2016-11-11 to 2022-05-05; creation date 2023-02-08; revision date 2023-12-15
notes: The official Defra Data Services page describes the first-return DSM as a raster elevation model covering about 99% of England at 1 m spatial resolution. It is produced from the first or only laser pulse returned to the sensor and includes heights of objects such as vehicles, buildings, and vegetation, plus terrain where the first/only return is ground. It is derived from National LIDAR Programme surveys captured between 11 November 2016 and 5 May 2022, merged with feathering along overlaps. The page explicitly says it will not match the coverage or extent of the last-return DSM because the last-return product also uses Time Series surveys. This row is distinct from v037 last/only return DSM and the existing DTM row.
desc_zh: Environment Agency LIDAR Composite First Return DSM 1m 是英格兰环境署发布的 1 米首回波数字表面模型，主要由 2016-2022 年国家 LiDAR 计划数据合成。它记录激光首次或唯一回波得到的表面高度，突出植被冠层、建筑物和其他最高可见表面，覆盖约 99% 的英格兰，但与常规 last-return DSM 的覆盖范围并不完全一致。
desc_en: Environment Agency LIDAR Composite First Return DSM 1m is a 1 m first-return digital surface model for England. It is derived from National LIDAR Programme surveys collected from 2016 to 2022 and records the first or only laser return, emphasizing canopy, buildings, vehicles, and other upper visible surfaces. The product covers approximately 99% of England but does not exactly match the last-return DSM extent, making it a distinct surface-height dataset.
openness: open under Open Government Licence v3.0 with attribution
source_type: official data portal/download service and GEE cloud analysis mirror
evidence: Defra Data Services dataset df4e3ec3-315e-48aa-aaaf-b5ae74d7b2bb title LIDAR Composite First Return Digital Surface Model (FZ_DSM) - 1m; summary says raster elevation model covering ~99% of England at 1m resolution, produced from first/only laser pulse and including surface objects; source National LIDAR Programme data from 2016-11-11 to 2022-05-05; first-return DSM will not match last-return DSM coverage or extent; downloadable as GeoTIFF rasters in 5km OS National Grid tiles; no public access constraints; licence Open Government Licence; vertical accuracy +/-15cm RMSE. GEE catalog UK_EA_ENGLAND_1M_TERRAIN_2022 lists a first-return DSM band in the 1m England composite.
feature_count: England first-return DSM tile collection; represented as first-return DSM band in GEE composite

name: Spain MDS05 Digital Surface Model 5 m First Coverage
provider: Instituto Geografico Nacional / Centro Nacional de Informacion Geografica (CNIG), Spain
theme_raw: Modelo Digital de Superficies MDS05 - 1ª cobertura
coverage: Spain national coverage where first-coverage PNOA LiDAR data exist; CNIG MTN50 sheet downloads; datos.gob notes no MDS for Ceuta, Melilla, or Gibraltar in the older catalog description
license: IGN/CNIG geographic data license compatible with Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 (CC-BY 4.0); attribution required
formats: COG (Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF) on the current CNIG Download Center page; older datos.gob catalog describes ESRI ASCII matrix (ASC); MTN50 sheet download units
access: CNIG Download Center product page and series search; Spanish national open-data catalog record; PNOA LiDAR product documentation
doi_or_citation: CNIG Download Center MDS05 first coverage; datos.gob catalog e00125901-spaignmds; CNIG DOI footer 10.7419/162.09.2020
time_span: PNOA-LiDAR first coverage; catalog option indicates MDS05 2008-2015; datos.gob modified 2020-01-01
notes: MDS05 is a 5 m digital surface model derived from first-coverage PNOA-LiDAR classified point clouds. CNIG states that it is interpolated from terrain, vegetation (low, medium, high), and building classes, with ETRS89 for mainland/Balearic/Ceuta/Melilla and REGCAN95 for Canary Islands, UTM projection by sheet, orthometric heights, MTN50 sheet downloads, and current COG format. The PNOA documentation describes MDS as the highest surface over terrain, natural objects, or artificial objects and says MDS generation uses first returns from terrain, vegetation, and building classes. datos.gob provides additional open-catalog evidence but appears older, describing ASCII ASC distribution and noting no MDS for Ceuta, Melilla, or Gibraltar.
desc_zh: Spain MDS05 是西班牙 IGN/CNIG 发布的 5 米数字表面模型，基于 PNOA-LiDAR 第一覆盖的分类点云生成，包含地面、植被和建筑物等最高表面信息。当前 CNIG 下载中心按 MTN50 图幅提供下载，并标注 COG 格式；该产品与已有 MDT02/MDT05 裸地地形模型不同，更适合城市表面、植被/建筑高度背景、可视性和表面粗糙度分析。
desc_en: Spain MDS05 is a 5 m digital surface model from IGN/CNIG derived from first-coverage PNOA-LiDAR classified point clouds. It represents the highest surface using terrain, vegetation, and building classes and is distributed through the CNIG Download Center by MTN50 sheet, with current product metadata indicating COG format. It complements the existing Spanish MDT terrain-model rows by representing surface objects rather than bare-earth terrain.
openness: open with attribution under IGN/CNIG terms compatible with CC-BY 4.0
source_type: official national download portal, national open-data catalog, and PNOA product documentation
evidence: CNIG Download Center page title Modelo Digital de Superficies MDS05 - 1ª cobertura; description says 5 m grid surface model obtained from terrain, vegetation, and building classes of first-coverage PNOA LiDAR; reference systems ETRS89/REGCAN95, UTM, orthometric heights; MTN50 download units; format COG; license compatible with CC-BY 4.0 with attribution; page lists 1,180 files. PNOA MDS documentation defines MDS as highest surface over terrain, natural vegetation, or artificial objects and generation from first returns of classes 2-6. datos.gob catalog e00125901-spaignmds confirms national 5 m surface model, PNOA-LiDAR first coverage lineage, creator CNIG, and license conditions URL.
feature_count: 1,180 CNIG MTN50 sheet files listed on the current Download Center page

name: France MNS LiDAR HD Digital Surface Model
provider: Institut national de l'information geographique et forestiere (IGN France) / data.gouv.fr
coverage: France metropolitan territory and overseas departments/regions except Guyane planned by 2026; ZICAD restricted zones use nodata where information is confidential
license: Licence Ouverte / Open Licence version 2.0 (lov2)
formats: GeoTIFF tiles; 1 km x 1 km tiles; 50 cm grid; WMS/WMTS visualization and WFS metadata/tile-index services via GeoPlateforme
access: data.gouv.fr dataset/API; GeoPlateforme WMS-Raster, WMTS, and WFS services; IGN LiDAR HD download interface noted by data.gouv, though direct diffusion directory returned 503 during v040 probing
doi_or_citation: data.gouv.fr dataset 675871c26e60265b46ab3576; GeoPlateforme resources IGNF_LIDAR-HD_MNS and IGNF_MNS_LIDAR-HD:dalle
time_span: National LiDAR HD acquisition program; dataset updated 2026-06-26 on data.gouv.fr; planned coverage by 2026
notes: MNS LiDAR HD is the IGN digital surface model derived from classified LiDAR HD point clouds. data.gouv.fr describes a regular grid providing heights of terrain and above-ground elements such as vegetation, buildings, and engineering structures, derived from ground, water, low/medium/high vegetation, building, and bridge-deck classes. It is distributed as 1 km x 1 km GeoTIFF tiles at 50 cm resolution; a 5 m version is planned. The direct diffusion-lidarhd.ign.fr/mnx/ directory returned 503 in this environment during v040 probing, so the verified URL list uses stable data.gouv and GeoPlateforme API/service endpoints rather than the transient directory.
desc_zh: France MNS LiDAR HD 是法国 IGN 基于国家 LiDAR HD 计划分类点云生成的高分辨率数字表面模型，表达地面以及植被、建筑物、桥面等地上要素高度。data.gouv.fr 说明该产品以 1 km x 1 km GeoTIFF 瓦片发布，网格间距 50 厘米，并计划到 2026 年覆盖法国本土和除圭亚那外的海外省区，适合城市表面、植被结构、基础设施和 DSM/DTM 对比分析。
desc_en: France MNS LiDAR HD is IGN France's high-resolution digital surface model derived from classified national LiDAR HD point clouds. It represents terrain and above-ground objects such as vegetation, buildings, and bridge decks, and is distributed as 1 km by 1 km GeoTIFF tiles at 50 cm spacing. The product is intended to cover metropolitan France and overseas departments/regions except Guyane by 2026, supporting surface-height, urban, vegetation, infrastructure, and DSM/DTM comparison workflows.
openness: open under Licence Ouverte / Open Licence 2.0
source_type: official national open-data catalog and GeoPlateforme services/API
evidence: data.gouv.fr dataset MNS LiDAR HD describes the product as a digital surface model derived from national LiDAR HD classified point clouds with at least 10 pulses/m² and 5 pulses/m² above 3200 m; derived from ground, water, low/medium/high vegetation, buildings, and bridge-deck classes; planned coverage of metropolitan France and DROM except Guyane by 2026; distributed as 1 km x 1 km GeoTIFF tiles at 50 cm; approximate 24 MB per 50 cm MNS tile; license Licence Ouverte/Open Licence version 2.0; updated 2026-06-26. data.gouv API exposes dataset id 675871c26e60265b46ab3576 and GeoPlateforme WMS/WMTS/WFS resources for IGNF_LIDAR-HD_MNS and tile metadata.
feature_count: 1 km x 1 km tile collection; GeoPlateforme service resources and WFS tile metadata
file_size: about 24 MB per 50 cm GeoTIFF tile according to data.gouv description

name: France MNS Correl Digital Surface Model
provider: Institut national de l'information geographique et forestiere (IGN France) / data.gouv.fr
coverage: French metropolitan and overseas territories except French Polynesia, New Caledonia, Wallis and Futuna; ZICAD restricted areas use nodata; API spatial footprint includes metropolitan France and several overseas regions
license: Licence Ouverte / Open Licence version 2.0 (lov2)
formats: WMS and WMTS services via GeoPlateforme; data.gouv API resources; 50 cm regular square grid derived from BD ORTHO image correlation
access: data.gouv.fr dataset/API; GeoPlateforme WMS and WMTS service endpoints
doi_or_citation: data.gouv.fr dataset 675871be6e60265b46ab3570; GeoPlateforme resources ELEVATION.ELEVATIONGRIDCOVERAGE.HIGHRES.MNS and SHADOW
time_span: Temporal coverage 2020-01-01 to 2026-01-01; data.gouv last update 2026-06-26; departmental updates every 3-4 years following BD ORTHO acquisition program
notes: MNS Correl is an IGN digital surface model at 50 cm spacing derived from BD ORTHO aerial imagery by image correlation, not from LiDAR. It describes the shape of ground and above-ground surface objects such as vegetation and buildings. It covers French metropolitan and overseas territories except French Polynesia, New Caledonia, Wallis and Futuna, with nodata over ZICAD restricted aerial data capture zones. This row is separate from France MNS LiDAR HD because the production method and source data differ, and separate from RGE ALTI because it is a DSM rather than a bare-earth terrain product.
desc_zh: France MNS Correl 是法国 IGN 发布的 50 厘米数字表面模型，基于 BD ORTHO 航空影像通过影像相关方法生成，而不是 LiDAR 点云。它描述地面及植被、建筑等地上表面形态，覆盖法国本土和多数海外领地（不含法属波利尼西亚、新喀里多尼亚、瓦利斯和富图纳），适合城市三维、林业、太阳能地籍、可视性和 DSM/DTM 对比分析。
desc_en: France MNS Correl is IGN France's 50 cm digital surface model produced from BD ORTHO aerial imagery using image correlation. It represents ground and above-ground surface features such as vegetation and buildings across metropolitan France and most overseas territories, excluding French Polynesia, New Caledonia, Wallis and Futuna, with nodata in restricted ZICAD areas. It complements MNS LiDAR HD by using a different source and production method, and complements RGE ALTI as a DSM rather than a bare-earth terrain model.
openness: open under Licence Ouverte / Open Licence 2.0
source_type: official national open-data catalog and GeoPlateforme service/API
evidence: data.gouv.fr page and API identify dataset MNS Correl, id 675871be6e60265b46ab3570, license lov2, last update 2026-06-26, temporal coverage 2020-2026. Description says MNS Correl is a 50 cm digital surface model from BD ORTHO, obtained by image correlation of aerial images, describing ground and above-ground surfaces such as vegetation and buildings; coverage includes French metropolitan and overseas territories except French Polynesia, New Caledonia, Wallis and Futuna; ZICAD areas use nodata; departmental updates follow BD ORTHO every 3-4 years. API lists GeoPlateforme WMS/WMTS resources ELEVATION.ELEVATIONGRIDCOVERAGE.HIGHRES.MNS and SHADOW.
feature_count: national 50 cm DSM service resources; WMS/WMTS layers and data.gouv API resources

name: Poland Digital Surface Model (DSM / NMPT)
provider: Head Office of Geodesy and Cartography Poland / Geoportal.gov.pl
theme_raw: Digital Surface Model (DSM) / Numeryczny Model Pokrycia Terenu (NMPT)
coverage: Poland national DSM coverage where Geoportal NMPT data are available; urban areas at 0.5 m mesh and the rest of the territory at 1.0 m mesh according to official Geoportal page
license: Geoportal open public data statement: provided free of charge and can be used for any purpose
formats: Arc INFO GRID sheet downloads via Geoportal; WFS index services for KRON86 and EVRF2007 height systems; WCS export can save fragments as GeoTIFF
access: Geoportal.gov.pl data page and map download workflow; WFS index services for NMPT-PL-KRON86-NH and NMPT-PL-EVRF2007-NH; WCS download tool in Geoportal for selected areas
doi_or_citation: Geoportal.gov.pl Digital Surface Model (DSM) page; WFS Numerycznego Modelu Pokrycia Terenu KRON86 and EVRF2007 services
time_span: Updated national DSM holdings; KRON86 WFS index names include NMPT2019 and EVRF2007 WFS index names include NMPT2020 in the inspected service URLs
notes: The Polish Geoportal DSM represents terrain plus objects protruding above it, including buildings, trees, bridges, overpasses, and other infrastructure. The official page states that DSM data are free of charge and can be used for any purpose. Data are downloaded from Geoportal under Data for download / Digital Surface Model using NMPT-PL-KRON86-NH and NMPT-PL-EVRF2007-NH layers. The page notes there are no viewing services for the DSM and users prepare visualization from downloaded source data. WMS index endpoints mentioned on the page returned HTTP 401 to direct GetCapabilities probing in this environment, while WFS index GetCapabilities endpoints were accessible and are used in v042 URL verification.
desc_zh: Poland Digital Surface Model / NMPT 是波兰 Geoportal.gov.pl 发布的国家数字表面模型，表达地形以及建筑物、树木、桥梁、立交和其他基础设施等高出地面的对象。官方页面说明城市区域网格约 0.5 米，其他区域约 1 米，数据免费并可任意用途使用，可通过 Geoportal 下载图幅、WFS 索引和 WCS 工具获取。
desc_en: Poland Digital Surface Model / NMPT is the national digital surface model distributed through Geoportal.gov.pl. It represents terrain together with above-ground objects such as buildings, trees, bridges, overpasses, and infrastructure, with a 0.5 m mesh in urban areas and a 1.0 m mesh elsewhere. The official page states that the data are free of charge and may be used for any purpose, with downloads through Geoportal layers and WFS/WCS workflows.
openness: free public use for any purpose according to Geoportal.gov.pl
source_type: official national geoportal page and WFS download-index services
evidence: Geoportal.gov.pl Digital Surface Model page states DSM represents terrain plus protruding objects such as buildings, trees, bridges, overpasses and infrastructure; Poland maintains DSM at 0.5 x 0.5 m mesh for urban areas and 1.0 x 1.0 m for the rest of territory; DSM data are provided free of charge and can be used for any purpose; downloads are available through Data for download / Digital Surface Model layer group with NMPT-PL-KRON86-NH and NMPT-PL-EVRF2007-NH layers; Arc INFO GRID sheet files and WCS export to GeoTIFF are described. WFS GetCapabilities for NumerycznyModelPokryciaTerenuEVRF2007 and KRON86 returned 200 and identify WFS services for the digital surface model.
feature_count: national DSM sheet collection indexed by NMPT KRON86 and EVRF2007 WFS services
